creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Paul, I'm using valgrind-3.21.0,1 from pkg, and a slightly older CURRENT around the time of the stable/14 branch. I will update one or both if necessary to reproduce, but want to know what steps I should take to try reproducing.

It looks like the pkg valgrind is not useful, because it has no debug info. I guess I'll need to build it locally.
